name: Planetary Mining Array Mk I
description: Automated strip-mining complex tuned for silicate and iron extraction on stable gravity wells.

name: Deep-Core Borehole Mk II
description: High-pressure drilling stack for denser ore veins and core-adjacent metals.

name: Asteroid Mass-Driver Rig
description: Anchored mass-driver that strips regolith and launches ore pods to orbiting haulers.

name: Asteroid Spectral Lab
description: In-situ assay lab for rapid spectral classification and anomaly prediction.

name: Cryo Volatile Extractor
description: Low-temperature extraction line for water ice and trapped volatiles on shadowed moons.

name: Moon Refinery Hub
description: Medium-scale refinery that upgrades raw ore into high-grade feedstock for shipyards.

name: Orbital Logistics Node
description: Relay station that stabilizes hauling lanes and improves throughput for nearby installations.

name: Defense Bastion Grid
description: Point-defense and shield relay network protecting mining assets from raiders.

name: Gas Scoop Platform
description: Atmospheric scoop network for hydrogen, helium, and volatile precursor collection.

name: Stellar Scoop Array
description: High-radiation collector swarm for trace heavy ions in stellar wind corridors.

name: Asteroid Smelter Hub
description: Vacuum smelter cluster that upgrades nickel-iron feedstock into hull-grade alloys near extraction sites.

name: Comet Cryogenic Processor
description: Cryogenic volatile processing rig tuned for cometary ices, ammonia compounds, and organic residue extraction.

name: Moon Mass-Driver Port
description: Orbital-linked rail launch complex that boosts export throughput from moon mines to industrial hubs.

name: Planetary Geothermal Tap
description: Deep mantle thermal tap that powers drilling and increases extraction from dense crustal strata.

name: Gas Deuterium Harvester
description: Fractionation lattice that concentrates deuterium-rich feed from gas giant atmospheres for fusion fuel chains.

name: Stellar Heavy-Ion Forge
description: Magnetically confined forge that harvests stellar wind ions and refines trace high-value heavy-element streams.

name: Wormhole Lensing Station
description: Extremely high-power interferometry array that measures Einstein-Rosen lensing candidates and stabilizes transient bridge events.

name: Dyson Swarm Anchor
description: Primary construction anchor and traffic coordinator for autonomous stellar collector swarms.

name: Autonomous Nanoforge Complex
description: Self-optimizing alloy foundry where predictive AI agents refine mixed ores into adaptive hull-grade feedstock.

name: Cognitive Fabrication Spire
description: Distributed model-fabrication tower where combat telemetry continuously retrains material and targeting blueprints.

name: Stellar Matter Printer
description: High-radiation additive forge that prints ultra-dense AI-reactive composites from stellar plasma trace streams.

name: Planetary Civic Megaforge
description: City-scale fabrication ring integrating public logistics, ship fitting lines, and bulk component assembly.

name: Mantle Drill Cathedral
description: Deep-bore extraction complex with refractory-lined shafts reaching mantle-adjacent mineral strata.

name: Biospore Arcology Dome
description: A symbiotic habitat-research dome where engineered biosystems support population and adaptive materials studies.

name: Gas Giant Skimmer Convoy Hub
description: Orbital convoy coordination node for deuterium skimmer fleets and volatile routing operations.

name: Fusion Isotope Separator Mk2
description: High-throughput isotope distillation stack tuned for deuterium-helium separation.

name: Hydrogen Crown Array
description: A magnetic siphon ring that lifts stellar hydrogen streams for conversion and strategic energy export.

name: Corona Magnetic Catapult
description: A high-field transfer launcher for exporting stellar harvest payloads into secure transport corridors.

name: Tidal Mass Lift Mk2
description: A synchronized lunar lift-and-launch grid that improves export cadence and reduces transit losses.

name: Asteroid Mesh Autofoundry Mk2
description: An autonomous refinery lattice that converts asteroid feedstock into standardized fabrication billets.

name: Volatile Siphon Spindle Mk2
description: Cryogenic siphon array that captures comet volatiles before plume losses dominate extraction.

name: Planetary Life Support Nexus
description: Centralized air, water, and atmosphere recycling network for dense colony districts.

name: Hydroponic Arcology
description: Stacked hydroponic towers and bioreactor farms for continuous food and oxygen output.

name: Moon Water Reclamation Array
description: Condensation and membrane array that recovers water from ice, vapor, and industrial loops.

name: Additive Fabrication Foundry
description: A modular additive-manufacturing foundry for on-site production of tools, casings, and spare assemblies.

name: Nutrient Biorefinery
description: Industrial fermentation and nutrient synthesis complex supplying colony food and medical feedstocks.

name: Emergency Biosphere Bunker
description: Hardened habitat bunker with redundant life-support loops and fail-safe atmospheric control.

name: Ammonia Feedstock Refinery
description: High-altitude skimmer refinery extracting nitrogen and hydrogen feedstocks for fertilizers and fuel precursors.
